title: 立ちたい場所はただ1つ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Mejiro Ardan and Mejiro Ryan as they're
finishing up practice at the dance studio.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Are your legs okay, Ardan? How's about we
spend the rest of our time watching some
example videos?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hellooooo! Thanks for the other day, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know this song! It's a total foot-fumbler.
Apparently, Yaeno's struggling with it too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, even Yaeno's having difficulty with this
song? But she's such an adept dancer...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've got a great idea! ♪ Since there are three of
us here, why don't we try putting the
choreography for the two sides and center
together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Practice with the three of us, eh? Sounds like fun,
but... How are your legs, Ardan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a single dance shouldn't hurt. Besides, I'd
love to try it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Not only is this an excellent opportunity for me to
dance with Chiyono O, but we might just learn
something that'll help Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah? Okay, let's get dancing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a plan! So who's going to dance
where?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Dance positions... Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to be in the center. Would that be all
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Your moves were even cleaner and sharper than usual, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's because I allocate the most time to
practicing in the center position.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Really? I think I tend to put off center
choreography practice...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It just sort of happens, since I might not get the
chance to dance in the center, even if I practice...
You really impress me, Ardan. How do you stay
motivated?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My wish is merely to strive for the moment in
which I can shine my brightest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Even if that moment only happens once...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Should such an opportunity arise, I couldn't stand
to let it pass me by, so... that is my motivation.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You want first place that badly, huh...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But you're right. If you're going to race, you have
to race to win...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to win too! All right! Time for me to do
some center dance practice as well!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Impressive as ever, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, and that's what makes Chiyono O, well,
Chiyono O. I'm sure Yaeno feels much the same
way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I had a feeling, but... Chiyono O and Yaeno really
are special to you, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Special? Well, yes. They're my precious rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You know what? When the time comes for you,
Chiyono O, and Yaeno to race, I'll definitely be
there watching!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My word, I think you're getting ahead of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But I do believe ours will make for a historic race,
so please do look forward to it.
